evals.prompt: Export all 3rd party addresses from my TRES environment as a contacts file
evals.expected_output: An XLSX with a Contacts tab (Contact Name, Contact Address, Contact Tag) matching the TRES import template and an Address details tab with network, tx counts, and USD volumes; deduplicated unidentified addresses from accountTxsSummary

evals.prompt: I want to build my address book — can you find all the external counterparties from my transactions and put them in a file I can import back?
evals.expected_output: XLSX workbook sourced from accountTxsSummary with identificationState UNIDENTIFIED, excludeInternalAccounts true, paginated; Contacts tab ready for user to fill names/tags before import

evals.prompt: We need to label our counterparties for the auditor. Can you pull all the unknown addresses from our ledger into a file I can fill in?
evals.expected_output: XLSX listing unidentified counterparty addresses sorted by total fiat volume, with enrichment tab to prioritize labeling
